data.title: Moonpig briefly broke through $0.02, with a 24-hour increase of more than 160%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN market data, moonpig briefly broke through $0.02 and is now at $0.0209, a record high, up more than 160% in the past 24 hours.
Odaily reminds users that the price of meme coins fluctuates greatly, and investors should pay attention to risks.

data.title: Bonk Guy: Don’t blindly follow any KOL’s token list. It is recommended to think independently and form a trading logic.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Trader @bonkboysol responded to the community debate on the X platform, saying that he has seen opinions such as "Murad's list is invalid, only Bonk Guy's list is important" or "Ansem's list is no longer valid, only Murad's list is useful" recently.
He said that Ansem and Murad are both OGs in the memecoin field that he respects very much and have made great contributions to promoting the development of this field. "Please don't put me against anyone, we can win together."
He emphasized that it is not recommended for users to blindly follow orders based on any KOL's token list, including his own suggestions. "You can refer to other people's ideas to build your own trading logic, but if you only trade randomly around a certain "protagonist" list, it is bound to bring a lot of pain."

data.title: Cardano targets blockchain supremacy with ouroboros Leios upgrade
data.description:
10-5-2025 – Cardano’s architect Charles Hoskinson has unveiled ambitious plans to elevate the network to unprecedented performance levels through its forthcoming Ouroboros Leios upgrade. The revolutionary protocol enhancement, representing the culmination of eight years’ research, introduces a sophisticated multi-tiered block structure. This architectural marvel encompasses input, ranking, and endorsement blocks, potentially catapulting Cardano past its [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/cardano-targets-blockchain-supremacy-with-ouroboros-leios-upgrade/

data.title: Explosions Reported in Jammu Following India-Pakistan Ceasefire Announcement
data.description: According to BlockBeats, explosions were heard in Jammu, India, shortly after India and Pakistan announced a ceasefire. Witnesses reported seeing artillery shells in the sky. Officials from the Jammu and Kashmir region confirmed that the blasts were audible throughout Srinagar, indicating a drone attack occurred hours after the ceasefire declaration.

data.title: Vietnam launches 1Matrix: A sovereign layer-1 blockchain to power digital independence
data.description:
10-5-2025 – Vietnam has embarked on an ambitious venture to craft its own layer-1 blockchain through the 1Matrix initiative. Spearheaded by a coalition of prominent Vietnamese institutions—including Techcombank, Techcom Securities, Masterise Group, and One Mount Group—this project seeks to anchor the nation’s digital ambitions in homegrown innovation, diminishing dependence on foreign technological frameworks. The initiative, [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/vietnam-launches-1matrix-a-sovereign-layer-1-blockchain-to-power-digital-independence/

data.title: XRP Whales Are Back – 880 Million Tokens Accumulated This Month
data.description:
XRP is now trading above the $2. 35 mark, gaining momentum as bulls aim to break through critical resistance on the way to a potential all-time high. This move comes as the broader crypto market enters a new bullish phase, with Bitcoin soaring past $100K and Ethereum reclaiming the $2,200 zone in a sharp rally. XRP, long viewed as lagging behind majors, now shows notable relative strength compared to other altcoins
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ripple/xrp-whales-are-back-880-million-tokens-accumulated-this-month/

data.title: Michael Saylor Advocates for Bitcoin's Role in Global Empires
data.description: According to Foresight News, Strategy founder Michael Saylor recently tweeted that "every empire needs Bitcoin." His statement was accompanied by an image from the Star Wars franchise.

data.title: The whale transferred 7078 ETH to OKX after 3 months, with a floating loss of about 1.49 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, the whale address became active again after 3 months, transferring 7,078 ETH to OKX, with a total value of approximately US$17.2 million at the current price. The address faces a floating loss of approximately US$1.49 million in this operation.

data.title: $2,950,000 Enters Fraudulent Accounts at JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo, Bank of America and BBVA in Million-Dollar Romance and Money Laundering Scheme: Report
data.description:
A man living in Phoenix, Arizona is heading to prison after allegedly using fraudulent accounts at JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo, Bank of America and BBVA to launder millions of dollars. Investigators say US resident and Nigerian citizen Kingsley Ibhadore stole nearly $3 million in a romance scheme targeting multiple women, reports FOX 10 Phoenix.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/09/man-deposits-2950000-into-fraudulent-accounts-at-jpmorgan-chase-wells-fargo-bank-of-america-and-bbva-in-lucrative-money-laundering-scheme-report/
